## Summary

Describe the change in one or two sentences.

## Section

Choose one section name exactly as it appears in the repository:

- Autonomous Web Agents
- Computer-use Agents
- AI Web Automation Tools

## Why this belongs

Explain how this directly helps build, run, evaluate, or operate AI systems that browse, control, scrape, or query the web.

## Primary documented web-agent use case

Link to the docs, repo, paper, or public write-up that shows web interaction is a primary use case.

## Public reference

Provide the public source reviewers should use to verify the submission.

## Affiliation disclosure

State whether you are affiliated with the project. If yes, describe the relationship.

## Checklist

- [ ] This PR adds exactly one item.
- [ ] I added the item to the bottom of the best-fit section.
- [ ] The description is factual, neutral, and ends with a period.
- [ ] This is directly relevant to web agents, not just AI tooling in general.
- [ ] I checked for duplicates before submitting.
